notes: Can't seem to get it to run. I've tried several proton versions, D3d11, disabling Esync, and running LD_PRELOAD on necessary lib files as I saw some people suggest. No matter what I do, the game will open a black window for a few seconds and then crash.
title: Hyper Light Drifter

notes:
Posting here even though it has a native Linux version.
If on Arch and you get the libcurl.so.4/CURL3 error make sure your environment variable "LANG" is not set to "C".
